about.headline: GERMANY’S BIGGEST COCKTAIL FESTIVAL

faq.headline: FAQ
faq.q1: What is the Cocktail X Passport?
faq.a1: The Passport is your digital festival pass. It gives you 18 days of access to exclusive cocktails at over 50 bars across Munich — at special festival prices.
faq.q2: Is the pass digital or physical?
faq.a2: The pass is fully digital. After purchase, you get access via the Cocktail X App. No printing needed — just show it at the bar.
faq.a3: Each time you visit a participating bar, you receive a digital stamp in the app. The more bars you visit, the more prizes you can win.
faq.q4: Do I have to visit all bars?
faq.a4: No, you can visit as many or as few bars as you like. Each bar offers its own exclusive cocktails at the festival price.
faq.a5: Yes! The Passport makes a perfect gift for cocktail lovers. You can simply transfer it to another person after purchase.
faq.a6: Yes, the Cocktail X App is your companion during the festival. It holds your pass, lists all participating bars, tracks your stamps, and offers exclusive content.
